caption: A person's hands are shown against a light-colored tabletop, holding a small, white plastic bottle with a label and a pointed applicator tip. The person wears a black long-sleeved shirt and a gold-toned watch with a brown leather strap on their left wrist. To the left of the bottle is a card with a floral illustration and the handwritten text, "do you little Letide Cheer You warm my heart". Below the card, a logo featuring a heart and the word "Stamping" is visible. The bottle is positioned over a piece of blue paper resting on a white gridded cutting mat. Across the sequence of frames, the person holds the bottle steady with both hands, maintaining a consistent position as they present the product. The setting and the arrangement of objects remain static throughout the clip.
